name: Golden Pecan Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup pecan halves or broken pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, flour, corn syrup, eggs, and vanilla. Beat well.
3. Stir in the butter and pecans.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie crust.
5. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes, or until the center of the pie is puffed and golden brown.
